summary: Completed comprehensive E2E testing of Stanvard School ERP. All 44 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend flows tested successfully including login, dashboard, navigation, students, receipts, reports, parent portal, and super admin school switching. No critical issues found.
passed_tests: AUTH: Login with all 5 roles (superadmin, school_admin, accountant, teacher, parent) - all return correct access_token and role
AUTH: GET /auth/me returns correct user profile
AUTH: GET /auth/my-schools returns 3 schools for super_admin, 1 school for school_admin
DASHBOARD: GET /dashboard/summary returns all KPIs (total_students, today_collection, monthly_collection, present_today, collection_trend)
STUDENTS: GET /students returns school-scoped students (97 students for GN school)
STUDENTS: Parent role only sees linked_student_id (1 student)
STUDENTS: GET /students/{id} returns single student detail
STUDENTS: POST /students creates student with auto-generated admission_number (GN-2025-0001 format)
STUDENTS: X-School-Id header switching for super_admin works (different students for different schools)
CLASSES: GET /classes returns school-scoped classes (10 classes)
FEES: GET /fees/heads returns 7 fee heads
FEES: GET /fees/plans returns 11 fee plans
FEES: GET /fees/student/{id}/dues returns dues + total_paid
PAYMENTS: POST /payments/collect creates offline payment with receipt_number (GN-2026-000002)
PAYMENTS: GET /payments/{id}/receipt.pdf returns valid PDF (3305 bytes, content-type: application/pdf)
PAYMENTS: POST /payments/razorpay/order creates real Razorpay order (order_TAut3v1amuL5Bv, 350000 paise) - LIVE keys, order creation is safe
PAYMENTS: POST /payments/razorpay/verify with invalid signature returns 400
ATTENDANCE: GET /attendance returns 864 records
ATTENDANCE: POST /attendance/mark bulk marks 5 students
HOMEWORK: GET /homework returns 18 items, POST /homework creates homework
EVENTS: GET /events returns 3 events, POST /events creates event
CIRCULARS: GET /circulars returns 3 circulars, POST /circulars creates circular
GALLERY: GET /gallery returns 2 albums
STAFF: GET /staff returns 6 staff members
NOTIFICATIONS: GET /notifications returns 2 notifications
REPORTS: GET /reports/collection with date filters returns 27 payments, total=137600
REPORTS: GET /reports/collection.pdf returns PDF (9430 bytes)
REPORTS: GET /reports/collection.csv returns CSV (4253 bytes)
REPORTS: GET /reports/collection.xlsx returns XLSX (7149 bytes)
AUDIT: GET /audit-logs for school_admin returns 16 entries (200)
AUDIT: GET /audit-logs for parent returns 403 (correctly forbidden)
SETTINGS: GET /settings returns school settings
SETTINGS: PATCH /schools/{id} for super_admin updates school
RBAC: Parent cannot POST /students (403)
RBAC: Teacher cannot POST /schools (403)
FRONTEND: Login page renders with demo accounts
FRONTEND: Demo account buttons fill credentials correctly
FRONTEND: Dashboard loads with KPI cards (Total Students: 97, Today's Collection: ₹14,000, Monthly: ₹65,000, Attendance: 85/87)
FRONTEND: Fee Collection Trend chart renders (7 days data)
FRONTEND: Attendance Today pie chart renders (Present/Absent)
FRONTEND: Recent Payments section shows 5 payments
FRONTEND: Upcoming Events section shows 4 events
FRONTEND: Navigation to Students page works - shows student list with search, filters, and 97 students
FRONTEND: Navigation to Receipts page works - shows payment records with View and PDF buttons
FRONTEND: Navigation to Reports page works - shows collection report with date filters and export buttons (PDF, CSV, Excel)
FRONTEND: Parent login redirects to /parent portal
FRONTEND: Super admin login shows Schools and Users nav items in sidebar
FRONTEND: School switcher visible in header for super admin (Ganesh Nagar • GN dropdown)
